info.english_meaning: to measureto weighto limitto compare in size
info.hindI_arTa: nApanA tOlanA anumAna se sidDa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: mAnamiha antarBAvaH  atrAyaM sakarmakaH  gfhaM nirmAti ityAdO sakarmakatvam upasargavaSAt arTAntaravfttyA vA ' iti mA. DA. vfttiH  ' mimIte mAyate mAne mAti tatrEva Sabluki' (Slo. 9) iti devaH  ' mAnam = vartanam ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' ADeyasyADArAd anaDikaparimARatA atra mAnam ' iti puruzakAraH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: upamA denA tOlanA nApanA anumAna karanA
samAna banAnA Adara karanA tulanA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'premAM mAtrAM mimImahe' (aTarva॰18.2.39) prakarzeRa mimIhe
'yajYasya (somaH) pramA'BimonmA pratimA vedyAM kriyamARAyAm' (kaWaka॰34.14) pramA=pramitiH
'sahasrasya prAmasi sahasrasya pratimA'si sahasrasyonmAsi (vA॰saM॰15.65)
'kA''sItpramA pratimA kiM nidAnam' (f॰10.130.3)
'na saMskftaM pra mimItaH' (aSvinO) (f0 5762) na pramimIto na hiMstAmiti sAyaRaH anekArTatvAdDAtUnAM hiMsArTaH
'mInAteH prayoge vikaraRaBedaSca pramAtuScetpramARApekzA sidDiH kasya pramitsA syAt' (upade0 sA0 299) pramAtumicCA pramitsA

'apemAM mAtrAM mimIhe' (aTarva॰18.2.40) apa ityupasargeRApagatadozatA mAnasya pratipAdyata iti sAyaRaH tena sADu mimIha ityarTaH Palati anyatra durlaBo'yamarTo'pasya prAyeRa duro'rTe pfTagBAve vA prayogadarSanAt
'eBirevEnaM (yajamAnaM) lokEH sammimIte' (tARqya॰7.1.1) samAnaM kftavAn BavatIti sAyaRaH
'mfRAlasUtramapi te na sammAti stanAntare' (suBAzitam) na sammAti avakASaM na laBate
'kAntAsammitatayopadeSayuje' (kA॰pra॰1)
'na vE nfBirnaradevaM parAKyaM sammAtumarhasya vipakvabudDe' (BA॰pu॰1.18.42) sammAtum=tulayitum=samIkartum
'darBasammitaM brahmavarcasakAmasya' (go॰gf॰4.7.7) darBasammitaM darBabahulam iti sAmaSramI
'pArIndraH SiSureza pARipuwake saMmAtu kiM tAvatA' (sA0 da0 1013 ityatrodAharaRam) sa mAtu samAviSatu saMBavatu avakASaM laBatAm
camarI SabarIkeSEH saMmimIte svavAlaDim' (skandapu0 kA0 4347) saMmimIta parimAti
'ratnasAraPalgu-kupyAnAmarGa-prativarRakamAnapratimAnonmAnAvamAnaBARqaM… nibanDapustakasTaM kArayet' (kO0 a0 272) avamAnaM gAmBIryam
'nirimAM mAtrAM mimImahe' (aTarva0 18242) nirmimImahe=sADu mimImahe nirityupasargo nirgatadozatAM nirduzwatAM mAnasya dyotayati mA'ntarikzam
'nirmIyante'sminBUtAni' (ni0 281) iyattayA paricCidyante ityarTaH

'etO yudDavidO raNge kAlanirmARayoDinO' (hari0 22288) kAlanirmARena kAlaM vimAya niyatakAlamityarTaH nityayoDinAviti vA yataScADvakAlanirmARam iti vArttikepyayamevArTaH anyatra nirpUrvo'yaM DAtuH prAyeRotpAdane racanAyAM prakalpanAyAM vA vartate taTA ca prayogAH praTante--nirmame nirmamo'rTezu maDurAM maDurAkftiH' (raGu0 1528) nirmame nirmitavAn niveSayAmAsa
'yasmAdezAM surendrARAM mAtrAByo nirmito nfpaH' (manu0 75) nirmitaH kftaH
'nirmAtuM praBavenmanoharamidaM rUpaM purARo muniH' (vikrama0 19) nirmAtum=racayitum kalpayitum
'trElokyanirmARakaraM janitram' (BA0 u0 717) ukto'rTaH
'nirmARameva hi tadAdaralAlanIyam' (mAlatI0 949) nirmARaM saMniveSaH
'bImAM mAtrAM mimImahe' (aTarva0 18241) vimimImahe viSezeRa mAnaM kurmaH viSizwaguRayogaH SmaSAnamAnasyocyata iti sAyaRaH
'Sakro vimimIte aDvanaH' (aTarva0 4112) ukto'rTaH
'sadyo jAto vyamimIta yajYam' (f0 1011011) vyamimIta=niramimIta
'sa sarvAsAM vimAnAni devatAnAM cakAra ha' (hari0 1348) vimAno'strI devayAne saptaBUmO ca sadmani
'imAM vimAnena saBAM viSantIM yayAvanaNgEraTa rAjarAjiH' (nE0 10107) vimAnaH karRIraTaH
'vi yo rajAMsyamimIta sukratuH' (f0 677)
'niDo nimitam' (pA0 3387) samantAnmitaM nimitam samArohapariRAham
'udimAM mAtrAM mimImahe' (aTarva0 18243) ucCabdena mAnasyotkarzaguRo'BiDIyate
'tolyate unmIyate sruvAdinA'vadIyate iti tolam' (aTarva0 172) ityatra sAyaRaH
'yajYasya (somaH) pramABimonmA pratimA vedyAM kriyamARAyAm' (kA0 saM0 3414) unmA unmAnamutseDamAnam
'yA mahatI mahonmAnA' (aTarva0 579) unmAnamUrDvamAnam mahocCrAyA ( nirftiH)
'tAnudamimIta yAvadagnihotramAsIttAvAnagnizwomaH' (tE0 saM0 1691) udamimIta tulayonmitavAn
'svaSabdonmAnAByAM ca' (bra0 sU0 2322) udyamya mAnamunmAnam
'yajYasya (somaH) pramABimonmA pratimA vedyAM kriyamARAyAm' (kAWaka0 3414) aBimA vistAramAnam
'yajYasya tvA pramayA'BimayA parimayonmayA parigfhRAmi' (Apa0 SrO0 454 9136) ukto'rTaH
'gAyatreRa prati mimIte'rkam' (f0 116424) pratimimIte'nukaroti
'narASaMsaH prati SUro mimAnaH' (tE0 brA0 2681) pratimimAnaH paricCindan
'asO vE lokaH pratimEza hyantarikzaloke pratimita iva' (Sa0 brA0 8335) pratimitaH pratibimbitaH pratiPalitaH
'pratimitaravidIpodBAsiSuBrAtapatra0' (rAja0 5483) ukto'rTaH
'kAsIt pramA pratimA kiM nidAnam' (f0 101303) pratimA pratikftiH
'sahasrasya pratimAsi' (vA0 saM0 1565)
'yajYasya (somaH) pramABimonmA pratimA vedyAM kriyamARAyAm' (kAWaka0 3414)
'atIva sarvalokezu yaSasA'pratimaH sadA' (hari0 1263) apratimo'nupamaH candrapratimaH candropamaH pratimaSabda uttarapadasTaH svasadfSe vartate
'vfzRo vaDriH pratimAnaM buBUzan' (f0 1327) pratimAnaM tulyabalaH sapatnaH aByamitrIyaH
'AsasAda raRe BojaM pratimAnaM DanuzmatAm' (BA0 droRa0 11631)
'so'rjunena hataH karRaH pratimAnaM DanuzmatAm' (BA0 karRa0 818) pratimAnaM DvajaBUtaH
'pratimAnezu kumBezu dantavezwezu cApare' (BA0 karRa0 2831) pratimAnaM gajakumBAntarAlam aDaH kumBasya vAhitTaM pratimAnamaDo'sya yadityamaraH
'parimAti muzwinA upasargavaSAtsakarmakaH pari yo raSminA divo'ntAnmame pfTivyAH' (f0 82518) parimARaM cakAra
'upa no vAjAn mimIhi' (aTarva0 203711) upamimIhi prayacCa
'asmaByaM citrA~ upa mAhi vAjAn' (f0 42210) ukto'rTaH
'pUrvIzwa indropamAtayaH pUrvIruta praSastayaH' (f0 8409) upamAtayo dAnAnIti sAyaRaH
'kA asya pUrvIrupamAtayo ha' (f0 4233) ukto'rTaH
'asmaByaM citrA~ upa mAhi vAjAn' (f0 42210) upamAhi dehi
